product_overview: A lightweight URL shortening MicroSaaS that lets users create, manage, and share short links with optional premium features and account-based dashboards for link management and statistics.
core_goals: Allow anyone to create shortened URLs quickly from the public landing page
Provide user accounts to manage, edit, and delete shortened URLs via a dashboard
Ensure reliable redirect behavior for short codes and surface clear errors for invalid codes
Offer a premium subscription path to monetize advanced features
Protect authenticated routes and provide clear authentication flows (register/login)

features.name: URL Shortening
features.description: Public form to create shortened URLs from long URLs and copy results for sharing.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter long URL in input field -> Click shorten button -> See shortened URL result -> Click Copy button -> See 'Copied to clipboard' confirmation
Navigate to / -> Enter invalid URL in input field -> Click shorten button -> See validation error message

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Register new accounts and login to access the dashboard and manage personal URLs.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click register button -> See success message prompting to login -> Navigate to /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field with existing email -> Fill password input field -> Click register button -> See error message about duplicate account
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click login button -> See dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with wrong password -> Click login button -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Dashboard URL Management
features.description: Authenticated dashboard for viewing, creating (from dashboard), editing, deleting URLs and viewing per-URL statistics.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click login button -> See dashboard at /dashboard -> View list of shortened URLs
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Create New URL -> Navigate to /dashboard/[new] -> Enter long URL in input field -> Click shorten button -> See new shortened URL in dashboard list
Navigate to /dashboard -> View list of shortened URLs -> Click to edit URL details on a link -> Fill edited fields -> Click Save -> See updated URL details in list
Navigate to /dashboard -> View list of shortened URLs -> Click to view URL statistics on a link -> See stats modal with visits and metadata
Navigate to /dashboard -> View list of shortened URLs -> Click Delete button on a URL -> Confirm deletion -> See URL removed from list
Navigate to /dashboard without being authenticated -> See redirect to /login or authentication required message
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click to edit URL details -> Fill invalid data -> Click Save -> See error message indicating invalid input

features.name: URL Redirect
features.description: Resolve short codes to their original destination and perform an automatic redirect when visiting a short URL.
user_flows: Navigate to /[shortCode] -> Browser requests GET /api/redirect/[shortCode] -> Receive redirect response -> Be redirected to original URL -> See original site content
Navigate to /[shortCode] -> Browser requests GET /api/redirect/[shortCode] -> Receive 404 or error response -> See 'Not Found' or error page explaining the short code is invalid

features.name: Premium Subscription
features.description: Public page describing premium plans and a CTA to subscribe for advanced features.
user_flows: Navigate to /premium -> View premium plans -> Click to subscribe on a plan -> See checkout or payment modal -> Complete payment -> See subscription confirmation and unlocked features
Navigate to /premium -> Click to subscribe on a plan -> Payment fails or is declined -> See payment error message and retry option
